title: Selling Online Courses Without PayPal: What Actually Works When You Are in a Restricted Country
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip do not work in your country. That is a platform problem, not a you problem. Here is what actually works.

content.text: Having a great online course and being unable to collect payment is a frustrating experience many creators in restricted countries face, with platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip being inaccessible due to geographic restrictions, banking limitations, or KYC requirements, leaving them without a reliable way to sell their digital products and get paid, this is a problem that affects not just the creator's income but also their ability to share their knowledge and skills with a wider audience
What You Are Actually Comparing

When looking for a PayPal alternative, it's essential to understand what you are actually comparing, as many platforms claim to be similar but have different features, fees, and restrictions, for instance, some platforms may have stricter KYC requirements or limited payment options, while others may have higher fees or less reliable payment processing, in contrast, crypto-native infrastructure offers a more straightforward and transparent way to sell digital products and get paid
Where the Traditional Platforms Break Down

Traditional platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip break down for creators in restricted countries due to their compliance decisions, fraud risk tiers, and banking infrastructure, which often exclude certain countries or require additional documentation, this can lead to account closures, payment delays, or even complete exclusion from the platform, making it impossible for creators to sell their digital products and get paid
What Crypto-Native Infrastructure Does Differently

Crypto-native infrastructure, on the other hand, does not have the same geographic compliance layer as traditional platforms, allowing creators in restricted countries to sell their digital products and get paid without restrictions, with the help of platforms like Unchained Commerce, creators can set up their own digital product stores and start selling immediately, without the need for a PayPal or Stripe account
The inability to collect payment is a major obstacle for creators in restricted countries, and one that can be overcome with the right tools and platforms
The Real Cost Difference

The real cost difference between traditional platforms and crypto-native infrastructure lies not just in the fees, but also in the reliability and accessibility of the payment processing, with traditional platforms, creators may face payment delays, account closures, or limited payment options, while crypto-native infrastructure offers a more stable and secure way to sell digital products and get paid, with lower fees and no need for a middleman
Which One to Use and Why

For creators in restricted countries, using crypto-native infrastructure is often the best option, as it allows them to sell their digital products and get paid without restrictions, with the help of platforms like Unchained Commerce, creators can set up their own digital product stores and start selling immediately, with lower fees and no need for a middleman, this option is not only more reliable but also more cost-effective in the long run
What Creators in Restricted Countries Are Asking

For creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, and other restricted countries, selling digital products without PayPal is a challenge that can be overcome with the right tools and platforms, by using crypto-native infrastructure, creators can set up their own digital product stores and start selling immediately, without the need for a PayPal or Stripe account, and with lower fees and no need for a middleman, this option is not only more reliable but also more cost-effective in the long run, and with the help of platforms like Unchained Commerce, creators can get paid online without restrictions
Crypto-native infrastructure offers a more reliable and accessible way to sell digital products and get paid, without the need for traditional payment platforms

Many creators in restricted countries face similar challenges when trying to sell their digital products, whether it's an online course, ebook, or software, the lack of access to traditional payment platforms like PayPal, Stripe, Gumroad, and Payhip can be a significant obstacle, but with the rise of crypto-native infrastructure, creators now have a more reliable and accessible way to sell their products and get paid
